challenges.title: 3D Hover Tilt
challenges.description: Create a card that tilts on hover using rotateX and rotateY.
challenges.hint: Use rotateX(10deg) rotateY(10deg) with perspective on parent.

solution.css: .scene { perspective: 800px; } .card { transition: transform 0.3s; } .scene:hover .card { transform: rotateX(10deg) rotateY(10deg); }

challenges.title: Depth Hover
challenges.description: Create an element that moves toward the viewer on hover using translateZ.

challenges.title: 3D Card Flip
challenges.description: Create a full card flip effect with front and back faces.
challenges.expected_outcome: Card flips to show back on hover.

solution.css: .scene { perspective: 800px; } .card { position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.6s; } .card:hover { transform: rotateY(180deg); } .front, .back { position: absolute; backface-visibility: hidden; } .back { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

challenges.title: Perspective Comparison Grid
challenges.description: Create a grid of identical elements with different perspective values to show the effect.
challenges.hint: Use same rotation but vary perspective from 200px to 2000px.
challenges.expected_outcome: Shows how perspective value changes the 3D appearance.

solution.css: .box { transform: rotateY(45deg); } .p200 { perspective: 200px; } .p500 { perspective: 500px; } .p1000 { perspective: 1000px; } .p2000 { perspective: 2000px; }

challenges.title: 3D Rotating Cube
challenges.description: Create a 3D cube with six faces that rotates continuously.
challenges.hint: Use 6 faces positioned with translateZ, preserve-3d on cube, and @keyframes for rotation.

solution.css: .cube { transform-style: preserve-3d; animation: spin 5s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { 0% { transform: rotateX(0) rotateY(0); } 100% { transform: rotateX(360deg) rotateY(360deg); } } .face { position: absolute; width: 200px; height: 200px; } .front { transform: translateZ(100px); } .back { transform: rotateY(180deg) translateZ(100px); } .right { transform: rotateY(90deg) translateZ(100px); } .left { transform: rotateY(-90deg) translateZ(100px); } .top { transform: rotateX(90deg) translateZ(100px); } .bottom { transform: rotateX(-90deg) translateZ(100px); }
